lines.speaker: Harry
lines.text: Welcome, you can buy fishing equipment at my store. We'll also give you a good price for any fish that you catch.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I get a fish for this bowl?

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.text: Sorry, you need to put some seaweed into the bowl first.

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.text: Yes, the fish seem to like it. Come and see me when you have put some in the bowl.

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.text: I can see that you have a nicely filled fishbowl there to use, and you can catch a fish from my aquarium if you want.

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.text: You will need a special net to do this though, and I sell them for 10 gold.

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.text: Well, I'll be happy to give you the net once you have the cash, but not before!

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.text: Sorry, I'm all out. I used up the last of it feeding the fish in the aquarium.

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.text: I have some empty boxes though, they have the ingredients written on the back. I'm sure if you pick up a pestle and mortar you will be able to make your own.

lines.speaker: Harry
lines.text: Here. I can hardly charge you for an empty box.
